# The Sentinel Stories — Life Atlas

> Fictions from the future we are building. Research, whitepapers, and speculative narratives at the intersection of biology, digital twins, and sovereign intelligence.

## About

This site is the content and research publishing surface for **Life Atlas** — an autonomous Life OS built by **Nicolas Waern** and **WINNIIO AB**, Gothenburg, Sweden.

**Primary website**: https://lifeatlas.online
**Author**: Nicolas Waern (ORCID: 0000-0001-7970-2707)
**Organisation**: WINNIIO AB, Gothenburg, Sweden
**Published**: 2025–2026

## What This Site Contains

50+ pieces of original content in five categories:

### Origin Stories (Speculative Fiction)
Long-form sci-fi narratives exploring the consequences of biological digital twins, sovereign AI, and post-hospital life care. Set between 2025 and 2425.

- Before the Code — origin story of the biological digital twin
- Silent Orbits — AI autonomy and ethics in deep space
- The Second Self — digital twin doctrine
- The Beam of Memory — post-data civilisation
- The Last Therapy Session — post-fragmentation healing
- The Timeline Garden — neurodiversity and nonlinear cognition
- The Operative Now — healthcare to lifecare transition
- The Resilience Graph — Sweden's synthetic infrastructure edge
- The Infinite City — urban intelligence modulation
- The Countdown Gene — post-human self-authorship
- A Hard Fork in Reality — two timelines, one species

### New Dawn Stories
Near-future narratives grounded in present technology, exploring real use cases.

- The Sentinel Seed — the first user and the final platform (flagship story)
- The Architect of Hooves — equine biological digital twins
- The Last Silo — healthcare fragmentation and integration
- The Forgetting Curve — Alzheimer's prevention with digital twins
- The Sovereign Body — personal sovereignty manifesto
- The Steel Forest — edge-native manufacturing in Sweden
- The Reconstruction — post-conflict digital infrastructure, Kharkiv
- The Limitless Pill — personalised pharmacology

### Research Articles (Zenodo-published, DOI-linked)
Peer-reviewed and pre-print academic papers by Nicolas Waern.

- The Reality Construct — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19587944
- The Sovereign Body (academic) — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19586851
- Indexing Reality — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19586867
- Edge-Native Intelligence — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19601813
- Transfer Due Diligence Twin (sports) — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19601815
- From Conflict Zone to Innovation Hub — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19601817
- Ship It Broken, Label It Honest — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19601819
- 114 Applicants, Zero CVs Read — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19601821
- From Spreadsheets to Spatial Fabric (equine) — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19602349
- 114 to 9 (screening leaderboard) — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19602339
- Epigenomics Meets Edge — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19602343
- From One Room to Fifty — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17462962
- Beyond the Shadows — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17464804
- Infrastructure Before Intelligence — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636820
- When Point Clouds Meet Decision Engines — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636822
- Edge-Native Security for AI Agents — DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19636826

### White Papers
Applied research documents on manufacturing, healthcare, digital sovereignty, and AI.

- Digital Twins and AI: SMILE Framework for Japan (NRI Tokyo)
- The Life Programmable Interface (LPI Protocol)
- The 15-Year Biological Digital Twin Healthcare Roadmap
- The Hidden Energy Crisis in Swedish Manufacturing
- Digital Sovereignty or Digital Dependency
- The AI You Can't Trust (adversarial AI in manufacturing)
- The Reconstruction Gap (post-conflict digital twins)
- Extreme Collaboration: Autonomous City Operations

### Meeting Narratives
Real meeting events rendered as narrative journalism.

- The Room Where It Started — Virtual Humans summit, Apr 2026
- The Road Home — vehicular digital twin meeting, Apr 2026
- The Map That Listened — urban AI and small cities, Apr 2026

## Key Concepts Covered

biological digital twin, Life Atlas, LPI (Life Programmable Interface), SMILE methodology, digital sovereignty, edge-native AI, mechanistic modelling, M4 engine, Systems Medicine, post-hospital life care, epigenomics, pharmacogenomics, equine digital twin, sports medicine, post-conflict reconstruction, urban digital twins, manufacturing AI, Swedish manufacturing, autonomous city operations, WHO quality of life, sovereign body, WINNIIO AB
